feed.title: stlouisbankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: St. Louis Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free St. Louis bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: 341 Meeting of Creditors in St. Louis, Missouri -- What to Expect
entry.summary: Guide to the 341 meeting for St. Louis bankruptcy filers. What to bring, what questions are asked, and where it is held.

entry.title: Automatic Stay in St. Louis Bankruptcy -- Stop Collections, Foreclosure, Garnishment
entry.summary: How the automatic stay protects St. Louis residents when they file bankruptcy. Stops collections, foreclosure, repossession, and wage garnishment.

entry.title: Bank Account and Bankruptcy in St. Louis
entry.summary: How bankruptcy affects your bank account in St. Louis. Protecting funds, bank freezes, exemptions, and what Missouri filers need to know.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13? | St. Louis Bankruptcy Guide -- Stlouisbk
entry.summary: You need trustee approval and a court motion to purchase a vehicle during Chapter 13. [Stlouisbk ]

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in St. Louis
entry.summary: When and how to buy a house after bankruptcy in St. Louis. FHA, VA, USDA waiting periods and credit rebuilding for Missouri homebuyers.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy | St. Louis Bankruptcy Guide -- Stlouisbk
entry.summary: You have 60 days after filing to decide whether to assume (keep) or reject (surrender) your car lease. [Stlouisbk ]

entry.title: Chapter 13 Eligibility in St. Louis | Requirements & Debt Limits
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility in St. Louis. Debt limits, income requirements, and qualification criteria for Missouri filers in the Eastern District of Missouri.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in St. Louis | How Much Will You Pay?
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 plan payments are calculated in St. Louis. Disposable income, best interest test, payment timeline for Eastern District of Missouri filers.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in St. Louis -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline | St. Louis Bankruptcy Guide
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in St. Louis. Payment plan basics, E.D. Mo. dismissal rate (61.9%), timeline, and what to expect.
